subject: a dry, dead landscape with a woven-debris bridge connecting floating grass-topped cliffs
description: A wide landscape view of a floating cliff environment. Two grassy plateaus are connected by a roughly constructed bridge made of tangled dried material — bark, dead wood, or debris woven together. The bridge spans a deep gap between the floating landmasses. The left cliff face is sheer and dark; the right cliff top has a single small bare tree. The sky is blue and clear. The overall tone is one of improvised survival on a ruined landscape.
foreground: makeshift debris bridge spanning a gap between floating cliffs
